message:
Keep stamp visible during hover, animate appearance, fix restore snap

Stamp visible: Container no longer goes opacity=0 during hover — the
stamp stays visible next to the full-size window so you can click it
to restore/un-minimize.

Animation: Hover window scales up from 30% to 100% over 200ms with
ease-out-quad for a less abrupt appearance.

Restore snap: Window position was unreliable after off-screen move
(get_monitor() returned wrong monitor). Now stores originalMonitor in
scale state and uses it during restore. destroyClone no longer tries
to restore position — _restoreWindow handles it via grid placement
and move_resize_frame.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
